traderpage

traderpage.Rmd

Use this page to check on your registration! You can search for your trader_name using the search bar.

Timestamp of last update: 2026-02-21 01:30:39.756424

This page is updated every evening until the start of the competition.

Please check that you’re able to sign in to the account listed beside your trader_name. If you have more than one account, contact the admins on Discord and let us know which account you want to use.

If your name does not appear on this list, check the timestamp of last update, above. If you created your account near that time, then its possible that the system can’t see it yet; just wait a day. If you created your account more than 3 hours before the timestamp, then post in the Discord.

Developed by Jake Vestal.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
